sample_note: Representative sample covering diverse CRUD + action patterns

summaries.POST /goals/{goal_gid}/addFollowers: Add a collaborator to a goal
summaries.POST /goals/{goal_gid}/removeFollowers: Remove a collaborator from a goal

descriptions.DELETE /custom_fields/{custom_field_gid}: A specific, existing custom field can be deleted by making a DELETE request on the URL for that custom field.
descriptions.DELETE /goals/{goal_gid}: A specific, existing goal can be deleted by making a DELETE request on the URL for that goal.
descriptions.DELETE /portfolios/{portfolio_gid}:
An existing portfolio can be deleted by making a DELETE request on
the URL for that portfolio.
descriptions.DELETE /projects/{project_gid}:
A specific, existing project can be deleted by making a DELETE request on
the URL for that project.
descriptions.DELETE /tasks/{task_gid}:
A specific, existing task can be deleted by making a DELETE request on
the URL for that task.
descriptions.GET /attachments: Returns the compact records for all attachments on the object.
descriptions.GET /attachments/{attachment_gid}: Get the full record for a single attachment.
descriptions.GET /custom_fields/{custom_field_gid}: Get the complete definition of a custom field’s metadata.
descriptions.GET /events:
Returns the full record for all events that have occurred since the sync
token was created.
descriptions.GET /goals/{goal_gid}: Returns the complete goal record for a single goal.
descriptions.GET /portfolios: Returns a list of the portfolios in compact representation that are owned by the current API user.
descriptions.GET /portfolios/{portfolio_gid}: Returns the complete portfolio record for a single portfolio.
descriptions.GET /projects: Returns the compact project records for some filtered set of projects.
descriptions.GET /projects/{project_gid}: Returns the complete project record for a single project.
descriptions.GET /projects/{project_gid}/tasks: Returns the compact task records for all tasks within the given project, ordered by their priority within the project.
descriptions.GET /tags: Returns the compact tag records for some filtered set of tags.
descriptions.GET /tags/{tag_gid}: Returns the complete tag record for a single tag.
descriptions.GET /tasks: Returns the compact task records for some filtered set of tasks.
descriptions.POST /batch: Make multiple requests in parallel to Asana's API.
descriptions.POST /custom_fields: Creates a new custom field in a workspace.
descriptions.POST /custom_fields/{custom_field_gid}/e: Creates an enum option and adds it to this custom field’s list of enum options.
Moves a particular enum option to be either before or after another specified enum option in the custom field.
descriptions.POST /goals: Creates a new goal in a workspace or team.
descriptions.POST /portfolios: Creates a new portfolio in the given workspace with the supplied name.
descriptions.POST /portfolios/{portfolio_gid}/addItem: Add an item to a portfolio.
descriptions.POST /portfolios/{portfolio_gid}/removeI: Remove an item from a portfolio.
descriptions.POST /projects: Create a new project in a workspace or team.
descriptions.POST /projects/{project_gid}/duplicate: Creates and returns a job that will asynchronously handle the duplication.
descriptions.POST /tags: Creates a new tag in a workspace or organization.
descriptions.POST /tasks:
Creating a new task is as easy as POSTing to the `/tasks` endpoint with a
data block containing the fields you’d like to set on the task.
descriptions.PUT /custom_fields/{custom_field_gid}: A specific, existing custom field can be updated by making a PUT request on the URL for that custom field.
descriptions.PUT /goals/{goal_gid}:
An existing goal can be updated by making a PUT request on the URL for
that goal.
descriptions.PUT /portfolios/{portfolio_gid}:
An existing portfolio can be updated by making a PUT request on the URL for
that portfolio.
descriptions.PUT /projects/{project_gid}:
A specific, existing project can be updated by making a PUT request on
the URL for that project.
